name: Simple Credential SD-JWT VC Type Metadata

display.name: Simple Credential
display.description: A simple verifiable credential with basic personal information

display.label: JWT ID
display.description: A unique identifier for the token

display.label: Issued At
display.description: The time at which the JWT was issued

display.label: Expiration Time
display.description: The time on, or after which the JWT MUST NOT be accepted

display.label: Verifiable Credential Type
display.description: A URI identifying the credential type

display.label: Family Name
display.description: Current last name(s) or surname(s) of the credential holder

display.label: Given Name
display.description: Current first name(s), including middle name(s), of the credential holder

display.label: Email Address
display.description: Electronic mail address of the credential holder

display.label: Date of Birth
display.description: Day, month, and year on which the credential holder was born
